_comment: Species: Devil Soul Beast (魔魂兽) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Devil Soul Beast

canonical.appearance: Devil-soul beast 4 m, body shifts between physical and soul-form, radiates devil+soul power
canonical.size: 4 m adult, 800 jin; ancient 15 m, 20000 jin
canonical.behavior: Devil+soul predator; cultivates by absorbing devil-qi and soul fragments
canonical.relationships: Servant-beasts of devil-sects; enemies of orthodox
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: devil_soul_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
